hero.label: Afungi Airport Operator
hero.description: AeroPalma is a Mozambican airport operator delivering world-class aviation security, hydro maintenance, and ground handling services to the energy sector's most demanding clients.

clients.label: Trusted By
clients.tagline: Serving the energy sector at Afungi Airport

services.title: Three pillars of
services.subtitle: Every service we deliver is built on years of operational experience and an unwavering commitment to safety.

items.title: Aviation Security Services
items.description: Comprehensive airside security operations ensuring full regulatory compliance. Our trained personnel deliver perimeter control, passenger screening, access management, and threat assessment to the highest international standards.

items.title: Hydro Maintenance
items.description: Specialized hydrant fueling system inspection, maintenance, and certification services. We keep your aviation fuel infrastructure in peak operational condition, reducing downtime and ensuring uninterrupted flight operations.

items.title: Ground Handling Services
items.description: End-to-end ramp and ground support for commercial and private aircraft. From marshalling and baggage handling to aircraft towing and cabin servicing — precise, safe, and on schedule.

about.title: Mozambique's premier airport
about.body1: AeroPalma is a proudly Mozambican company operating at Afungi Airport, serving the specialized aviation needs of the global energy sector with local expertise and international standards.
about.body2: From securing aircraft to managing ground operations and maintaining critical fuel infrastructure — our teams operate with precision 24/7, because in aviation, reliability is non-negotiable.

contact.title: Ready to elevate your
contact.description: Contact our team to discuss how AeroPalma can support your aviation and energy operations at Afungi Airport.
contact.placeholderMessage: Tell us about your operational requirements…
contact.successBody: WhatsApp has been opened. We'll get back to you shortly.

footer.tagline: Mozambique's premier aviation operator at Afungi Airport.
